title: Per-driver date-range fleet breakdown
problem: Muhammad asked 'TOTAL NET EARNING PER DRIVER FROM 1ST OF JUNE TILL 28TH OF JUNE'. Even when routing reached the fleet lane correctly (B-157 fixes that), the fleet lane had no per-driver date-range path -- it returned fleet totals with top-3 drivers only via the range rollup.
solution: Added driverRangeRef() detection regex, driverRangeRankings() aggregator (all drivers ranked high-to-low for the resolved date window), renderDriverRangePacket() renderer, and buildDriverRangeChart() -- all inserted in lib/fleet.js. The new routing block fires in buildFleetContext BEFORE the fleet insight and range-rollup paths, ensuring 'per driver' phrasing gets a full ranked list, not fleet totals.
live_test: tests/BUILD158_LIVE_TEST.md -- DEPENDS ON B-157 live first
routing_priority: Fires BEFORE rollup and fleet-insight in buildFleetContext. Single-driver questions still go to driverDailySeries (they have a subject). No regression on fleet totals, MTD ranking, or single-day mission control.
notes: Live test must wait for B-157 to deploy (wallet lane currently intercepts the question before it reaches fleet). Once B-157 is live, send the T1 question on phone and verify a ranked driver list appears with a bar chart.
